name: ddaro
description: ddaro - worktree-based parallel workflow plugin (self-hosted marketplace)

plugins.name: ddaro
plugins.description: Worktree-based parallel workflow for Claude Code sessions. 6-tier worktree classification (main / owned / adopted / protected / unmanaged / external), /ddaro:adopt to bring existing worktrees under management, cwd-safe destructive commands (clear/abandon from main only), size-based merge review, crash-recoverable context logs, and opt-in main_protection hooks (off/warn/strict). Korean triggers: 따로, 병렬로, 분리해서.
